200# return «

User rating: item not rated yet

Fighter type: Archer

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

Once in a while, Hellsong performs one of his songs: - Damage done by each of the enemies is reduced by 40%, and each enemy’s armor is reduced by 40%. The effect lasts 2 sec. - Each ally’s next attack deals 50% more damage.

description 4/6

Once in a while, Hellsong performs one of his songs: - Damage done by each of the enemies is reduced by 60%, and each enemy’s armor is reduced by 55%. The effect lasts 2 sec. - Each ally’s next attack deals 60% more damage. - Casts a shield with a durability of 10000 on all allies. - Restores 40000 health in each ally.

description 6/6

Once in a while, Hellsong performs one of his songs : - Damage done by each of the enemies is reduced by 75% and each enemy’s armor is reduced by 60%. The effect lasts 2 sec. - Each ally’s next attack deals 75% more damage. - Casts a shield with a durability of 15000 on all allies. - Restores 60000 health in each ally. - Deals 20000 damage to all enemies. Once in a while, Hellsong masterfully plays all his songs at once. The effects of all songs are enhanced and last for 5 sec. - Damage done by each of the enemies is reduced by 85% and each enemy’s armor is reduced by 70%. - Each ally’s next attack deals 85% more damage. - Casts a shield with a durability of 20000 on all allies. - Restores 100000 health in each ally for 5 sec. - Deals 100000 damage to all enemies for 5 sec.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

When Van Hellsong performs a song that reduces the damage of enemies, all enemies are also stunned for 0,5 sec.

description 4/6

When Van Hellsong performs a song that reduces the damage of enemies, all enemies are also stunned for 0,5 sec. When Van Hellsong performs a song that restores health, the damage of all allies is also increased by 15% for 4 sec.

description 6/6

When Van Hellsong performs a song that reduces the damage of enemies, all enemies are also stunned for 0,5 sec. When Van Hellsong performs a song that restores health, the damage of all allies is also increased by 15% for 4 sec. When Van Hellsong performs any song, a random enemmy takes pure damage equal to 5% of their max health.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

When Van Hellsong performs a song that increases damage, all allies also gain a shield that absorbs 100000 damage of any type.

description 4/6

When Van Hellsong performs a song that increases damage, all allies also gain a shield that absorbs 100000 damage of any type. When Van Hellsong performs a song that grants a shield, all allies also gain a shield that absorbs 20% damage of any type for 4 sec.

description 6/6

When Van Hellsong performs a song that increases damage, all allies also gain a shield that absorbs 100000 damage of any type. When Van Hellsong performs a song that grants a shield, all allies also gain a shield that absorbs 20% damage of any type for 4 sec. When Van Hellsong performs a song that resotres health, they remove 1 random negative effect from each ally.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

When Van Hellsong performs a song that reduces the damage of enemies, the crit of all enemies is reduced by 50% for 2 sec. When Van Hellsong performs a song that increases damage, the crit of all allies is increased by 50% for 2 sec.

description 4/6

When Van Hellsong performs a song that reduces the damage of enemies, the crit of all enemies is reduced by 50% for 2 sec. When Van Hellsong performs a song that increases damage, the crit of all allies is increased by 50% for 2 sec. When Van Hellsong performs a song that restores health, the healing received by all allies is increased by 45% for 4 sec.

description 6/6

When Van Hellsong performs a song that reduces the damage of enemies, the crit of all enemies is reduced by 50% for 2 sec. When Van Hellsong performs a song that increases damage, the crit of all allies is increased by 50% for 2 sec. When Van Hellsong performs a song that restores health, the healing received by all allies is increased by 45% for 4 sec. When Van Hellsong performs a song that increases damage, the max health of all allies is increased by 25% for 5 sec.

Materials

Strings of Revenge
Dangerous Brooch
